scripts.build: cd hanzo-dev && cargo build --release --bin dev --bin dev-tui --bin dev-exec
scripts.build:dev: cd hanzo-dev && cargo build --bin dev --bin dev-tui --bin dev-exec
scripts.test:local: if [ -d hanzo-dev ]; then (cd hanzo-dev && cargo run -p hanzo-dev -- --version); elif [ -d codex-cli ]; then (cd codex-cli && npm link && codex --version); else echo 'no CLI workspace found' >&2; exit 1; fi
scripts.fix: cargo fmt && cargo fix --allow-dirty && cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty
